allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('train.py'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('tune.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntaxe OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('train.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('tune.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntaxe OK'\)")
